paper.title_en: Observational Signatures of Rotating Ayón-Beato-García Black Holes: Shadows, Accretion Disks and Images
paper.abstract_en: We investigate the shadows, accretion disks, and observational images of rotating Ayón-Beato--García (ABG) black holes with mass $M$, spin $a$, and nonlinear-electrodynamics (NLED) charge parameter $ζ$, treating photons as neutral test particles on null geodesics of the background metric so as to obtain the purely geometric shadow. The shadow shrinks with increasing $ζ$ and develops a ``D''-shaped morphology for near-extremal spin. The thermal disk properties follow from the Novikov--Thorne model with inner edge at the innermost stable circular orbit (ISCO), whereas the images use a separate, phenomenological optically thin emission model extending to the horizon. The image asymmetry and redshift maps depend strongly on $(a, ζ)$ and the inclination. Comparing the geometric shadow diameters with Event Horizon Telescope observations of M87$^{*}$ and Sgr A$^{*}$ gives the indicative estimates $ζ\lesssim 0.21\,M$ and $ζ\lesssim 0.43\,M$, respectively; since $ζ$ characterizes each black hole individually, these are quoted separately rather than combined, and the Kerr limit $ζ= 0$ remains fully consistent with both.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 研究旋转ABG黑洞的阴影、吸积盘和图像，并与EHT观测比较，理论推导和数值模拟方法可靠，结果对理解非线性电动力学黑洞有意义。
decision.title_zh: 旋转Ayón-Beato-García黑洞的观测特征：阴影、吸积盘和图像
decision.abstract_zh: 我们研究了旋转Ayón-Beato-García（ABG）黑洞的阴影、吸积盘和观测图像，其中黑洞具有质量$M$、自旋$a$和非线性电动力学（NLED）电荷参数$ζ$，将光子视为背景度规零测地线上的中性试验粒子，从而获得纯几何阴影。阴影随$ζ$增大而缩小，并在近极端自旋时呈现“D”形形态。热盘性质基于Novikov-Thorne模型，内边缘位于最内稳定圆轨道（ISCO），而图像则使用一个独立的、现象学上的光学薄发射模型，延伸至视界。图像不对称性和红移图强烈依赖于$(a, ζ)$和倾角。将几何阴影直径与事件视界望远镜对M87$^{*}$和Sgr A$^{*}$的观测比较，给出了指示性估计$ζ\lesssim 0.21\,M$和$ζ\lesssim 0.43\,M$；由于$ζ$表征每个黑洞个体，这些估计分别给出而非合并，并且Kerr极限$ζ= 0$与两者完全一致。
